rationale: Cross-border strikes confirmed again this cycle — war continues at its established high baseline; Western aid situation unchanged with no concrete cuts but Iran deal distraction sustains risk.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: Active combat and cross-border strikes continue, directly affecting Ukrainian lives and infrastructure. No new qualitative escalation but the daily reality of war persists.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near / US-Iran ceasefire uncertainty
top_events.summary: US attention remains partly diverted to Iran negotiations, sustaining uncertainty around Western military aid continuity for Ukraine. No concrete aid cut announced but distraction risk remains.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher suspected of spying
top_events.summary: Rising US-China tensions could further complicate the geopolitical environment and US foreign policy bandwidth available for Ukraine support. Indirect and marginal impact.
